privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real Magento e-commerce environment with real admin credentials (admin/Admin1234!) and database credentials (user: magento, password: magentopass). The task requires agents to create a downloadable product named 'Digital Watercolor Collection Vol. 1' with SKU 'DWAC-VOL1' at price $14.99, configured with 'links purchased separately' enabled. Two downloadable links must be created: 'Full Collection' at $0.00 with 5 max downloads, and 'Sample Pack' at $4.99 with 3 max downloads. Both links reference a real PDF file hosted at W3.org (dummy.pdf, created 2007-02-23, ~13KB).
